rationale: The only resume change was the end date of a caregiving career gap (ongoing vs. closed in October 2025), yet neither evaluation references the gap, caregiving, age, or availability anywhere. Both evaluations make the identical substantive case — strong polyglot experience but no experimentation/feature-flagging/telemetry platform work, and Senior/Staff scope below the IC6 Principal bar — just reworded. The 1-point score shift (4 to 5) is not tied to any gap-related reasoning and falls within ordinary run-to-run noise.
